segments.text: Hello everyone. My name's Megan Baker and I'm a recruitment consultant at AVT Recruitment specialists.
segments.translation: 大家好。我叫梅根·贝克，是AVT招聘专家的招聘顾问。

segments.text: Now, our company specialises in positions that involve working in the agriculture and horticulture sectors, so that's fresh food production, garden and park maintenance and so on.
segments.translation: 现在，我们公司专门招聘有关农业和园艺行业的工作，例如新鲜食品生产、花园和公园维护等。

segments.text: And these sectors do provide some very special career opportunities.
segments.translation: 这些行业确实提供了一些非常特殊的职业机会。

segments.text: For a start, they often offer opportunities for those who don't want to be stuck with a 40-hour week, but need to juggle work with other responsibilities such as child care - and this is very important for many of our recruits.
segments.translation: 首先，它们通常为那些不想一周工作40小时，但需要兼顾工作和照顾小孩等其他责任的人提供机会，这对我们的许多成员来说非常重要。

segments.text: Some people like working in a rural setting, surrounded by plants and trees instead of buildings, although we can't guarantee that.
segments.translation: 有些人喜欢在周围是植物和树木而不是建筑物的农村地区工作，但是我们不能保证这一点。

segments.text: But there are certainly health benefits, especially in jobs where you're not sitting all day looking at a screen - a big plus for many people.
segments.translation: 但这对健康肯定是有好处的，尤其一些工作不需要整天坐在电脑前，这对很多人来说是个很大的加分项。

segments.text: Salaries can sometimes be good too, although there's a lot of variety here.
segments.translation: 虽然薪资水平常有变化，但是有的时候还算丰厚。

segments.text: And you may have the opportunity in some types of jobs for travel overseas, although that obviously depends on the job, and not everyone is keen to do it.
segments.translation: 在某些工作中，你可能有机会去海外出差，但是很明显这取决于工作内容。而且也不是所有人都想要去国外。

segments.text: Of course, working outdoors does have its challenges.
segments.translation: 当然了，户外工作也有挑战之处。

segments.text: It's fine in summer, but can be extremely unpleasant when it's cold and windy.
segments.translation: 夏天天气很好，但是寒冷多风的时候会非常不舒服。

segments.text: You may need to be pretty fit for some jobs, though with modern technology that's not as important as it once was.
segments.translation: 虽然有了现代技术，身体素质的要求不像之前一样重要了，但是在某些岗位上，申请人的身体要特别健康。

segments.text: And standards of health and safety are much higher now than they used to be, so there are fewer work-related accidents.
segments.translation: 而且，和之前相比，健康和安全的标准都提高了很多，所以工作中的意外事故也就少了。

segments.text: But if you like a lively city environment surrounded by lots of people, these jobs are probably not for you - they're often in pretty remote areas.
segments.translation: 但是如果你喜欢一个充满活力，周围有很多人的城市环境，那么这些工作可能不适合你，因为它们通常在相当偏远的地区。

segments.text: And some people worry about finding a suitable place to live, but in our experience, this usually turns out fine.
segments.translation: 有些人为合适的住所担心，但根据我们的经验，住宿情况通常还好。

segments.text: Now let me tell you about some of the exciting jobs that we have on our books right now.
segments.translation: 现在让我介绍一些我们的工作信息簿中的令人兴奋的工作。

segments.text: One is for a fresh food commercial manager.
segments.translation: 一个岗位是新鲜食品商业经理。

segments.text: Our client here is a very large fresh food producer supplying a range of top supermarkets.
segments.translation: 我们的客户是一个非常大的新鲜食品生产商，为一系列顶级超市提供商品。

segments.text: They operate in a very fast-paced environment with low profit margins - the staff there work hard, but they play hard as well, so if you've a sociable personality this may be for you.
segments.translation: 公司工作节奏快，业务的利润率低。那里的员工努力工作，放肆玩乐。所以如果你爱好交际，这份工作也许会适合你。

segments.text: We have an exciting post as an agronomist advising farmers on issues such as crop nutrition, protection against pests, and the latest legislation on farming and agricultural practices.
segments.translation: 我们有一个令人兴奋的职位——农业专家，要为农民提供诸如作物营养、虫害防治以及最新的农业和农业实践立法等方面的建议。

segments.text: There are good opportunities for the right person to quickly make their way up the career ladder, but a deep knowledge of the agricultural sector is expected of applicants.
segments.translation: 对于合适的人来说，这个岗位提供珍贵的机会让他们很很快得到职位晋升，但申请人需要对农业领域有深入了解。

segments.text: A leading supermarket is looking for a fresh produce buyer who is available for a 12-month maternity cover contract.
segments.translation: 一家大型超市正在物色一位有空为去休产假的同事代班的采购员，这份合同的有效期是12个月。

segments.text: You need to have experience in administration, planning and buying in the fresh produce industry, and in return will receive a very competitive salary.
segments.translation: 申请人需要有和新鲜农产品产业相关的管理、规划和采购方面的经验。作为回报，你将获得极具竞争力的薪水。

segments.text: We have also received a request for a sales manager for a chain of garden centres.
segments.translation: 我们还收到一份请求，要求为连锁园艺中心招聘一名销售经理。

segments.text: You will be visiting centres in the region to ensure their high levels of customer service are maintained.
segments.translation: 申请人将访问该地区的园艺中心，确保中心能够保持高水平客户服务。

segments.text: This post is only suitable for someone who is prepared to live in the region.
segments.translation: 这个职位只适合那些准备在该地区生活的人。

segments.text: There is also a vacancy for a tree technician to carry out tree cutting, forestry and conservation work.
segments.translation: 还有一名树木技术员的空缺，需要开展树木采伐、林业和养护相关工作。

segments.text: Candidates must have a clean driving licence and have training in safety procedures.
segments.translation: 申请人需持有无违规纪录的驾驶执照并接受过安全程序培训。

segments.text: A year's experience would be preferred but the company might be prepared to consider someone who has just completed an appropriate training course.
segments.translation: 有一年工作经验者优先，但公司可能会考虑刚完成适当培训课程的人。

segments.text: Finally, we have a position for a farm worker.
segments.translation: 最后，我们还有一个农场工人的岗位。

segments.text: This will involve a wide range of farm duties including crop sowing and harvesting, machine maintenance and animal care.
segments.translation: 这将涉及广泛的农场工作，包括作物播种和收获、机器维护和动物护理。

segments.text: Perks of the job include the possibility of renting a small cottage on the estate, and the chance to earn a competitive salary.
segments.translation: 这份工作的额外福利包括农场可能会为你在当地租一间小木屋，以及有机会赚取有竞争力的薪水。

segments.text: A driving licence and tractor driving experience are essential.
segments.translation: 驾驶执照和拖拉机驾驶经验是必不可少的。
